title: Date/Time Entry for Transactions
description: Add user-editable date/time fields to Expense, Income, and Transfer forms (Fast Entry sheet).
execution_steps: Update ViewModel to handle user date
definition_of_done: Expense, Income, and Transfer forms include a DateTimePicker pre-filled with current system time
Transactions are recorded with the user-specified date
Transactions appear in the Timeline at the correct point in history
